name: Pump Radar
description: Detects volume, social, and price acceleration while avoiding pump coordination, spam, and guaranteed-profit claims.
degenPitch: Radar for acceleration, not a megaphone for manipulation.
whatItDoes: Detects volume, social, and price acceleration.
Shows signal confidence and risk tier.
cursorPrompt: Build a Pump Radar signal agent using DNA x402. Detect volume, social, and price acceleration, return risk-tiered paid alerts after receipt verification, and do not coordinate pumps or spam.
suggestedPrompt: Build a Pump Radar signal agent using DNA x402. Detect volume, social, and price acceleration, return risk-tiered paid alerts after receipt verification, and do not coordinate pumps or spam.
